title: cerasus alpina
intro: Cerasus alpina, also known as the alpine cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Cerasus alpina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its bark and leaves are also used in traditional folk remedies.
